import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          mut c = 0
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(x)
            c = x
          when None
            c = 0
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      if signed > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
